$description: yesid.dev design tokens (DTCG). Source of truth — generators in build.ts produce all other token surfaces. GO2-W5 INTERLOCKING, taste round 2: dark = the original near-black board (operator: deep dark + orange CONTRAST — orange is a voice, never a surface wash), light = daylit station wayfinding wall (approved). Terminals are the SITE background in both modes — identity carried by chrome/border/type. Structure (rules, dividers, section borders) carries the orange/yellow voices boldly. Round 3 (operator: amplitude up): every structural divider is one step thicker in BOTH modes and the light-mode blueprint art/brand grid is stronger still — light reads slightly more pronounced than dark. All AA pairs script-computed (WCAG 2.x relative luminance).

primary.$description: THE interactive aspect (route-set): links, buttons, focus rings, the orange dot in 'yesid.' Light theme overrides to #9D5200 for AA on warm paper; dark re-pins #E07800 so .theme-dark scene pinning survives inside light pages.

accent.$description: Yellow voice AS SURFACE/ART only: hazard tape, lamps, selection, chip dots. NEVER body text — use accent-text. Never clickable.

primary-rgb.$description: RGB channels for rgb(var(--primary-rgb) / alpha) usage.

hazard-a.$description: Hazard tape stripe A — always yellow. Theme-invariant: real tape doesn't reskin.

hazard-b.$description: Hazard tape stripe B — warm black, theme-invariant (light stays BLACK+YELLOW like real safety tape, never orange+white). 10.06:1 stripe pair.

signage-bg.$description: Backlit station-sign chip background — theme-invariant (real signs don't reskin).

signage-text.$description: Station-sign digits on signage-bg. 10.06:1 in both modes.

signal-caution.$description: Signal-lamp alias — amber aspect (text form = accent-text).

background.$description: Taste round 2: the amber/bakelite board is REJECTED — restored pre-GO2-W5 near-black. Deep neutral dark so orange reads as CONTRAST, never as a wash.

foreground.$description: Restored neutral white. 16.84:1 bg · 15.91 card · 13.12 popover.

muted-foreground.$description: Restored neutral (GO-W2.2 value). Worst-case 4.73:1 on popover (6.07 bg, 5.74 card).

card.$description: Restored neutral panel one step above bg — still SOLID; alpha on --card is forbidden (grid must never bleed through).

terminal.$description: EQUALS --background by contract (taste round 2): terminals are the SITE background, solid/opaque — identity carried by chrome strip, rule border and mono type, never by surface color. contrast-floors.test.ts locks the equality.

border-strong.$description: Restored neutral emphasized rule (2.08:1 bg). Scale stays subtle < default < strong. Brand-loud structure now lives in --border-rule / --border-rule-accent.

primary.$description: Re-pin for .theme-dark subtrees inside light pages.

accent-text.$description: Accent when used AS text. Identical to --accent in dark; darkened amber ink in light.

input.$description: GO2-W5: was #3A3A3A (1.8:1, latent 1.4.11 FAIL). Conforming dark form boundary — 3.31 bg / 3.12 card (recomputed on the restored neutrals); warm because form boundaries are interactive.

terminal-chrome.$description: Terminal titlebar/footer strip — neutral machined chrome one step BELOW the board (taste round 2: re-derived for the restored near-black bg).

terminal-ink.$description: Terminal output text (warm phosphor — type IS the terminal identity). 14.28:1 on terminal (= bg).

signal-lunar.$description: Lunar-white shunt aspect — neutral/inactive indicator dots. 11.59 card / 12.26 terminal.

lamp-bezel.$description: Signal-head target-plate ring behind lamps on busy surfaces (decorative).

line-amber.$description: Metro/track SVG stroke — the yellow line. 10.53:1 on bg.

accent-surface.$description: SOLID yellow-tint chip/selected-filter bg (no alpha — grid never bleeds). accent-text 8.24:1, primary 4.72:1, fg 13.22:1 on it.

grid-glow.$description: Sodium-lamp radial spill from top (dark only).

edge-highlight.$description: 1px inset top bevel on cards — panel catching light (decorative).

background.$description: Daylit station paper — warm enamel (deepened one step from #FAF6EE for stronger card lift, 1.10).

muted-foreground.$description: GO2-W5 warm shift. Worst-case 4.75:1 on muted (5.14 bg/terminal, 5.64 card, 4.76 manifesto).

card.$description: SOLID enamel plate on the paper — cards lift above bg. Alpha forbidden.

terminal.$description: EQUALS --background by contract (taste round 2): the cream-console surface is rejected — terminals are the SITE background, solid/opaque; chrome/border/type carry the identity. contrast-floors.test.ts locks the equality.

border.$description: Taste round 2 HARDER: was #DCD3C2 (1.33:1, operator: too soft). 1.68:1 bg / 1.85 card — a drawn line, not a smudge.

border-subtle.$description: Hardened one step past the old default (1.47:1 bg).

border-strong.$description: Taste round 2 HARDER: was #C2B7A3 (1.78:1). 2.83:1 bg / 3.10 card — strong rules genuinely read as structure on paper.

success.$description: GO2-W5: was #15803D (4.16:1 on warmer muted). 5.33 bg / 5.85 card / 4.93 muted.

primary.$description: AA interactive orange on warm paper: 5.17 bg/terminal · 5.67 card · 4.78 muted (was #A65600, 4.40 on warmer muted).

accent-text.$description: Amber ink — yellow voice AS TEXT (wayfinding digits, caution labels). Worst case 4.71:1 on terminal-chrome; 5.38 bg · 5.90 card · 4.98 muted.

input.$description: Form boundary (WCAG 1.4.11): 3.08 bg / 3.38 card; decorative --border stays lighter.

terminal-chrome.$description: Chrome strip (titlebar/footer) — a deeper paper step on the page-colored terminal body.

terminal-ink.$description: Console ink on the paper terminal. 10.69:1 on terminal (= bg).

signal-lunar.$description: Lunar shunt aspect on paper. 7.04 card / 5.93 muted.

lamp-bezel.$description: Target-plate ring so lamps sit on a plate in daylight (decorative).

line-amber.$description: The yellow line that survives paper — graphics ≥3:1 (3.14 bg / 3.44 card).

accent-surface.$description: SOLID yellow-tint chip bg. accent-text 5.19:1, primary 4.99:1, fg 15.27:1 on it.

grid-line-major.$description: Light grid finally visible: 9% primary on warm paper (was 5% on near-white).

mono.$value: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Cascadia Code', monospace

glow-lg.$value: 0 0 24px color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 15%, transparent), 0 0 60px color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 6%, transparent)

card.$value: 0 0 16px color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 8%, transparent), 0 2px 8px rgba(10, 7, 4, 0.35), inset 0 1px 0 var(--edge-highlight)
card.$description: GO2-W5: warm black term + platform-lamp top catch-light folded into the token — every shadow-card consumer gets the bevel for free.

sheet.$description: GO-W2.2: formalizes the TocPill bottom-sheet shadow.

surface.$description: GO-W2.2 luminance-ordered surface scale. Pure var() aliases — zero drift, theme-switching flows through. GO2-W5 flip: 1 now aliases var(--card) so every card-family consumer lifts one step above the page; use var(--background) directly for page surfaces. 0=terminal/code, 1=card (lifted), 2=canonical card, 3=side panels, 4=elevated chips, hero=manifesto/detail heroes.

border.$description: GO-W2.2 brand-border + hairline aliases (Constitution Section 13 card spec, defined ONCE) + the GO2-W5 taste-round-2 BOLD structural rules: lines, delimitations, dividers and section borders carry the two brand voices loudly in both modes while surfaces stay calm. Round 3 (operator): the whole structural grid is one step THICKER — rule/brand consumers draw at 2px (hazard tape sm 3px / md 6px, footer tape 3px), and light mode additionally raises --border-brand to 60% via the app.css hand region so paper structure reads slightly more pronounced than dark.

brand.$description: Card/panel edges — the brand grid. Taste round 2: raised 25% → 45%. Round 3: consumers draw it at 2px; light mode overrides to 60% (app.css hand region) — dark keeps 45%.

rule.$description: SOLID orange structural rule — terminal chassis, dashed filter delimitations, accent rails. Full-strength route-set voice (6.01:1 dark bg, 5.17:1 light bg). Round 3: drawn at 2px everywhere (chassis, .divider-dashed).

rule-accent.$description: SOLID yellow wayfinding rule — departure-board lines (footer status rule). #FFB627 dark (10.50:1), #B57F00 light (3.14:1). Never interactive. Round 3: drawn at 2px.
